title: Siragugal  Lyrics Sarvam Song lyrics
stanzas: Song: Siragugal Yengo Sella Iravugal

Singer: Javad Ali, Madhushree
Movie:  Sarvam
Music: Yuvan
Lyrics : Pa Vijay

Siragugal vanthu yengo sella
iravugal theerthathu kannil mella
ninaivugal yenguthu unnai kaanaveeeeee...

Kanavugal ponguthu yethele alla
valigalum serdhathu ulle kella
sugangalum kooduthu unnai theydiyeeeee...

unnai unnai thaandi sella
konja kaalam konja thooram konja neram kooda yennal aahumaa.......

unnai unnai thedi thaane
intha yaekam intha paathai intha payanam intha vazhkai aanathoo....

Kanavugal ponguthu yethele alla
valigalum serdhathu ulle kella
sugangalum kooduthu unnai theydiyeeeee...

ohhhh ohhhhhhh
nadhiye ne yengae endru karaikal thedak koodaathaa
nilave ne yengae endru mugilhal thedak koodaathaa

ohhhhhh
mazhlai iravinil kuyilin geetham thoodipathaaai yaar arivaar
kadal nodiyyin kidakkum palarain kanavugal yaar arrivar

anbe nee yengi irukkiraai vazhithaal anbe nee angi irukiraaai
uyire nee yennna sei kiraai uyirin ulle vanthu selkiraai

anbe yenthan nenjam yenge poovin ulle nilavin meyle
theeyin kile kariku veliye illayeee....

unnthan kannil unnthan moochil unnthan iravil unnthan nenjil
unnthan kaiyil unnthan uyiril ulla vazhiyeee...

ohhhhhhhhhhhhhhh
yenake nan sumaiyaai maari yennai sumanthu vantheyne
unnakke nan nillalai maaari unnai theydi vantheyne

vizhi ninaikira neram paarthu immai vilahi vidaathu
uyir thudithidum munnney yenthen uyir othukki vidaathu

ulaham oru pulli yaahuthey nenjam yengo mithanthu poguthey
uyiril oru poo vedikkuthey suhamo vazhiyo ellai meeruthey

siragugal vanthu yengo sella
iravugal theerthathu kannil mella
ninaivugal yenguthu unnai kaanaveeeeee...

oru immai yengilum thenil moolga
maru immai maathiram vazhiyil noga
yidayinil yeppadi kanavum kaanumoooo..

unnai unnai thaandi sella
konja kaalam konja thooram konja neram kooda yennal aahumaa.......

unnai unnai thedi thaane

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Siragugal?

The song Siragugal expresses themes of love and longing, capturing the emotions associated with cherished memories and dreams.

What is the context of this song in the movie Sarvam?

In Sarvam, Siragugal plays during a pivotal moment that highlights the romantic connection between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of Siragugal?

The song features the talented voices of Javed Ali and Madhusree.

Who composed the music for Siragugal?

The music for Siragugal was composed by the renowned Yuvan Shankar Raja.

When was Siragugal released?

Siragugal was released on February 16, 2009.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Siragugal, the lyrical beauty unfolds as the singers express deep emotions of love and nostalgia. The song serves as a backdrop to significant moments in Sarvam, enhancing the romantic narrative. With its soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics by Pa Vijay, it evokes a sense of longing and warmth. This enchanting duet captures the essence of cherished memories and dreams, making it a timeless piece in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Siragugal from the movie Sarvam is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Javed Ali and Madhusree, paired with Yuvan's soulful composition, this song creates a magical atmosphere. Dive into the emotional depths of this track that resonates with anyone who has ever experienced love's sweet nostalgia.
stanzaMeanings: The wings come to tell where the nights are.
The wings have come to tell where the nights have ended, softly in the eyes, where are the thoughts of seeing you...
Dreams are flowing, not just paths, all the joys gathered inside are searching for you...
You, you, crossing over, a little time, a little distance, a little moment, is it possible for me...?
You, you, searching for me, this journey, this path, this life is eternal...
Dreams are flowing, not just paths, all the joys gathered inside are searching for you...
Ohhhh ohhhhhhh river, where are you? Don't let the moon search for you. Where are you, clouds? Don't let them search for you.
Ohhhhhh in the dream of the night, the cuckoo sings, who knows? Many dreams will rest by the sea, who knows?
Beloved, where are you? In the path of life, beloved, where are you? Oh life, what are you doing? You come into my life...
Beloved, where is my heart? Where is it? Under the flower, above the moon, below the fire, it is not outside...
In your eyes, in your breath, in your heart, in your hands, in your life, the way is inside...
Ohhhhhhhhhhhhhhh I have become calm, they have brought me to you, I have come searching for you, I have come searching for you...
When I see the moment, don't let this life go away, my life will not let go of you...
The world is like a thorn, where is my heart going? In life, a flower blooms, is there peace in the path?
The wings come to tell where the nights are.
If there is a moment, in the honey, the other moment is just a path, how can dreams be seen...
You, you, crossing over, a little time, a little distance, a little moment, is it possible for me...?
You, you, searching for me, this journey, this path, this life is eternal...
